content: I will update `index.html` to relocate the action buttons and control bar to the top of the editor and canvas panel respectively.
thinking:
**Refining Interface Elements**

I'm currently working on redesigning the interface in `index.html`. My focus is on relocating action buttons to the top and updating the `#sketch-editor-title` line. I'm taking a close look at lines 260-262 in `index.html` to finalize these changes.


**Reorganizing Button Placement**

I've replaced the existing `<h3 id="sketch-editor-title">` element with a `div` containing the title and action buttons. The action buttons are now at the top, and the old bottom button section is removed from `index.html`. My focus is now on `#sketch-element-controls` and its placement.


**Relocating Control Bar**

I've moved the `#sketch-element-controls` div to the top of the right panel, placing it above the canvas wrapper. I've adjusted the styles to ensure the control bar is centered and responsive, including `flex-wrap` and adjusted `mb-3`. The focus now shifts to ensuring the control bar's functionality remains intact after this move.


**Adjusting Container Layout**

I'm now changing how the control and canvas areas are arranged in `index.html`. My approach involves modifying the flexbox properties to ensure the control bar sits at the top and the canvas wrapper starts drawing from the top. I'm focusing on the canvas scroll container, and adjusting `justify-center` to `justify-start` in a parent div. I'll need `multi_replace_file_content` to make all the adjustments to lines 259-263, and the canvas scroll container.


**Integrating Action Buttons**

I'm now integrating the action buttons, previously at the bottom, within a div. This div will be inserted at the top, along with the title. I've re-styled the buttons to better fit the layout and to complement the new placement. This is being finalized in `index.html`.


**Refactoring Right Panel**

I'm now completely refactoring the right panel's HTML. I'm focusing on cleaning up lines 395-432 in `index.html`. This involves restructuring the layout, especially the canvas area and its surrounding elements, to ensure better responsiveness and a cleaner architecture. My focus is now on the new structure, with attention on lines 395-432.

args.Description: "Move the save/print/cancel action buttons to the top header of the editor container, and move the element controls bar to the top of the canvas right panel."
args.Instruction: "Relocate action buttons to editor header, and element controls to top of canvas panel."
